working_title: Why editorial agents need narrow publication authority
user_question: Why should editorial agents have narrow publication authority?
direct_answer: Narrow authority keeps evidence, review, and irreversible publication decisions accountable.
unique_value: An explicit thesis tested against the strongest automation counterargument.
ai_disclosure: AI assisted with research and drafting; the named human editor owns the opinion.
update_trigger: Material evidence about safe autonomous publication changes.
